sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: ServiceNow는 2026년 1분기 실적에서 가이던스 상단을 상회하는 매출 성장과 구독 수익 증가를 달성했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 2026년 1분기 구독 매출은 36억 7,100만 달러로 전년 대비 22% 성장하며 가이던스 상단을 상회했습니다.
총 매출은 37억 7,000만 달러를 기록했으며, 연간 구독 매출 전망치를 상향 조정했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 500만 달러 이상의 순 신규 연간 계약 가치(ACV)를 기록한 거래가 16건 발생하여 전년 대비 약 80% 성장했습니다.
AI 네이티브 경험을 전 상업적 계층에 도입하고, 기업의 의사결정을 지원하는 'Context Engine'을 중심으로 플랫폼 혁신을 추진했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 1분기 총 매출은 37억 7,000만 달러로 전년 대비 22% 증가했습니다.
향후 12개월 내 수익으로 인식될 현재 잔여 수행 의무(cRPO)는 126억 4,000만 달러로 전년 대비 22.5% 성장했습니다.
연간 계약 가치(ACV)가 500만 달러를 초과하는 고객 수는 630개사로 전년 대비 약 22% 증가했습니다.

watchItems.text: 상향 조정된 연간 구독 매출 가이던스가 실제 분기별 실적에서 어떻게 구체화되는지 확인이 필요합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 3 erq1fy26.htm EX-99.1 Document ServiceNow Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results • ServiceNow beats high end of guidance across all Q1 2026 topline growth and profitability metrics, raises full year subscription revenues outlook • Subscription revenues of $3,671 million in Q1 2026, representing 22% year-over-year growth, 19% in constant currency • Total revenues of $3,770 million in Q1 2026, representing 22% year-over-year growth, 19% in constant currency • Current remaining performance obligations of $12.64 billion as of Q1 2026, representing 22.5% year-over-year growth, 21% in constant currency • Remaining performance obligations of $27.7 billion as of Q1 2026  Normalized numeric aliases: $3,671 million = 36억 7,100만 달러; $3,770 million = 37억 7,000만 달러; $12.64 billion = 126억 4,000만 달러; $27.7 billion = 277억 달러; $1 million = 100만 달러; $3,671 = 3,671달러; $3,770 = 3,770달러; $12.64 = 12.64달러; $1 = 1달러; $27.7 = 27.7달러; 3,671 million = 36억 7,100만 달러; 3,770 million = 37억 7,000만 달러.

iceNow (NYSE: NOW), the AI control tower for business reinvention, today announced financial results for its first quarter ended March 31, 2026, with subscription revenues of $3,671 million in Q1 2026, representing 22% year-over-year growth and 19% in constant currency. “ServiceNow’s first quarter performance beat the high end of our guidance once again,” said ServiceNow Chairman and CEO Bill McDermott. “Since our founding, we’ve built our platform around the work customers need to accomplish. Today, they rely on ServiceNow to be their AI control tower for business reinvention. Customers trust our platform because we integrate with any model, cloud, interface, data, and system they choose to deploy. As new technologies create both opportunity and risk, our two decades of engineering combined with deep business context enable us to orchestrate and secure the agentic enterprise.   Normalized numeric aliases: $3,671 million = 36억 7,100만 달러; $3,671 = 3,671달러; 3,671 million = 36억 7,100만 달러.

foundation, our AI growth is far exceeding even our own expectations, reinforcing our position as one of the fastest growing enterprise software companies ever.” As of March 31, 2026, current remaining performance obligations (“cRPO”), contract revenue that will be recognized as revenue in the next 12 months, was $12.64 billion, representing 22.5% year-over-year growth and 21% in constant currency. The company had 16 transactions over $5 million in net new annual contract value (“ACV”) in Q1 2026, representing nearly 80% year-over-year growth, and ended the quarter with 630 customers with more than $5 million in ACV, representing approximately 22% year-over-year growth. “In Q1, we exceeded the high end of our topline and profitability guidance metrics, grew free cash flow, and returned capital to shareholders,” said ServiceNow President and CFO Gina Mastantuono. “The early cl  Normalized numeric aliases: $12.64 billion = 126억 4,000만 달러; $5 million = 500만 달러; $12.64 = 12.64달러; $5 = 5달러.

rmis acquisition meaningfully expands our TAM and accelerates our subscription revenue growth trajectory. With agentic AI, workflow orchestration, security, and data fabric converging on a single platform, we believe the most compelling chapter in ServiceNow's growth story is just beginning.” Recent Business Highlights Innovation This quarter, ServiceNow advanced enterprise AI into new product categories, new ways of working, and a new comm ercial model. 2 • In April, ServiceNow delivered a complete AI-native experience across every commercial tier, with AI, data connectivity, workflow execution, security, and governance built in by default. At the center is Context Engine, the organizational intelligence that grounds every AI decision in live enterprise context: which asset ties to a regulated process, which approval chain applies, and which decision precedent governs the outcome.
